# lookdev-auto

> lookdev-auto is a Claude Code skill for automated visual tuning: a vision model rates rendered variants and suggests better values in a loop.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install lookdev-auto@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/lookdev-auto-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
